---
title: Blockquotes
---

A single-line blockquote:

> Quoted text on one line.

A multi-paragraph blockquote:

> First paragraph of the quote.
>
> Second paragraph of the quote, with **inline formatting** and a
> [link](/elsewhere).

A nested blockquote:

> Outer quote.
>
> > Inner quote.
>
> Outer continues.

Body after the quotes.
